Container.Name: subtitle-worker
Container.Overview: Subtitle generation worker. Uses faster-whisper to transcribe audio tracks and write .srt files alongside source media. Calls catalog-api to tag items subtitle-complete on success. Requires ffmpeg on the container PATH (included in image).

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: subtitle-worker HTTP port. POST /jobs to submit a transcription job.

Config.Name: Whisper Model Cache
Config.Description: Persistent cache for downloaded Whisper models. Prevents re-downloading on container restart.

Config.Name: Work Directory
Config.Description: Subtitle scratch, inbox, and output staging area.

Config.Name: Domestic TV
Config.Description: Domestic TV share. Worker writes .srt files alongside source media.

Config.Name: International TV
Config.Description: International/Anime/JAV share. Worker writes .srt files alongside source media.

Config.Name: CATALOG_API_URL
Config.Description: Base URL of catalog-api. Worker PATCHes subtitle-complete tag on job completion. Leave blank to disable.

Config.Name: HF_HOME
Config.Description: Hugging Face / faster-whisper model cache directory inside container.
